description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-split-panel` (T3-08) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-split-panel/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, orientation typed (horizontal/vertical), initial size/min/max typed as numbers or percentages
2. Accessibility — divider has `role="separator"`, aria-orientation, keyboard resizable (Arrow keys move divider), aria-valuemin/max/now for divider position, axe-core pass
3. Tests — drag to resize, keyboard resize, min/max constraints, snap points, panel collapse, 80%+ coverage
4. Storybook — horizontal/vertical, with min/max, collapsible panels
5. CSS — `--hx-*` tokens, resize handle styling, cursor changes, CSS parts (start-panel, end-panel, divider)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-split-panel/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-split-panel — T3-08 antagonistic quality review
